overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime drive on elevated highways through a dystopian futuristic city. The camera moves smoothly past neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and industrial structures while maintaining moderate speed through light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching neon-lit city center

agents.ego_description: cruising on multi-lane highway toward the illuminated city skyline with sparse traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: car with red taillights driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: three massive towers with vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays dominating the skyline
large blue billboard with 'CIRKUS' text and red star logo
tall modern highway lamps with bright white LED strips
metal safety barrier along the right edge of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated highway at night, driving toward a distant city center dominated by three massive neon-lit skyscrapers. The road is relatively empty with only a few vehicles visible ahead, while a prominent blue 'CIRKUS' billboard stands on the right side of the highway.

events.description: entering covered area beneath concrete overpass, ambient light decreases significantly
exiting overpass back into open highway with industrial buildings visible on right

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while passing under highway overpasses and alongside large billboards

entered.detail: vertical billboard displaying 'VOTE PERALEZ' with political figure and red-white graphics
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars spanning across the road
illuminated advertisement showing a figure in yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through a corridor of large billboards including a prominent 'VOTE PERALEZ' political advertisement. The camera passes under concrete overpass structures that temporarily darken the scene before emerging back into the open, with industrial buildings becoming visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through industrial district with moderate traffic

events.description: traffic density increases significantly with multiple vehicles now visible in all lanes

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic while approaching industrial zone with power lines and factories

notable_agents.action: white sedan maintaining position ahead in the center lane
dark colored car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: large factory structures with minimal lighting and smokestacks visible against the night sky
high voltage electrical transmission towers with multiple cable lines

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a busier traffic environment with multiple vehicles surrounding the camera. Industrial buildings and electrical infrastructure dominate the right side of the road, while the neon skyscrapers recede into the left background. The scene maintains a steady forward motion through the industrial outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp around industrial complex with warning signage

events.description: road curves sharply to the right around large industrial building requiring lane adjustment

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp right curve on the elevated ramp while following traffic around the industrial complex

notable_agents.action: red taillights of car navigating the curve ahead

entered.detail: massive dark industrial structure with prominent red neon 'NO ENTRY' signage near the top
yellow and black diagonal arrow warning signs indicating the sharp curve direction
large metal electrical transmission towers with multiple cross-arms and cables

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into a sharp right curve marked by yellow chevron signs, wrapping around a massive industrial building with prominent red 'NO ENTRY' neon signage. Power lines and pylons dominate the skyline as the camera follows the curving ramp, with the vehicle ahead navigating the bend.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a wide approach toward a neon city center into a dense industrial outskirts zone. It begins on an open road heading toward three massive glowing skyscrapers, passing a prominent blue CIRKUS billboard under a dark night sky. As the camera moves forward, it glides through a corridor of political advertisements and under concrete overpasses that momentarily dim the light before revealing industrial structures on the horizon. The scene then expands into a busier traffic flow where the city skyline recedes into the background, replaced by electrical infrastructure and heavy industry. Finally, the highway shifts into a sharp right curve marked by yellow chevron signs, wrapping around a massive building with red NO ENTRY neon signage beneath a skyline of power lines and pylons.
